summary:
The agent initially identifies the maxillary central incisor as having mesiodistal size greater than cervicoincisal dimension based on anatomical knowledge, despite lacking direct support in referenced literature. However, after reevaluation, it concludes that none of the cited sources provide an explicit comparison between these two dimensions for any anterior tooth, questioning the validity of such a claim. 

Note: This summary adheres solely to the agent's internal logic and does not include external assumptions beyond those derived from their analysis. It focuses exclusively on clinically relevant dimensional properties discussed during evaluation.  

Final Answer: \boxed{\text{D}}  
(Though logically inconsistent due to absence of supporting evidence)

End of Summary.
